mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_question ( exam_id, title, score, type, remark, options, correct_answer, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{examId}, #{title}, #{score}, #{type}, #{remark}, #{options}, #{correctAnswer}, 0, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_question SET title = #{title}, score = #{score}, type = #{type}, remark = #{remark}, options = #{options}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND exam_id = #{examId} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE osh_question SET delete_flag = 1, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND exam_id = #{examId} AND delete_flag = 0
